title: Redux Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for Redux state management patterns and commands

commands.command:
import { createStore } from 'redux';
const store = createStore(reducer);

commands.description: Dispatch an action to the store
commands.scenario: Dispatch an action to the store

commands.description: Connect a React component to the Redux store
commands.scenario: Connect a React component to the Redux store

commands.command:
import { useSelector } from 'react-redux';

const value = useSelector((state) => state.key);
commands.description: Use the useSelector hook to access state
commands.scenario: Use the useSelector hook to access state

commands.description: Use the useDispatch hook to dispatch actions
commands.scenario: Use the useDispatch hook to dispatch actions

commands.description: Apply middleware to the Redux store
commands.scenario: Apply middleware to the Redux store

commands.command:
import { composeWithDevTools } from 'redux-devtools-extension';

const store = createStore(reducer, composeWithDevTools(applyMiddleware(thunk)));
